description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by blue bands around the stock and handguard. The receiver area is angular, with orange highlights visible through geometric cutouts, suggesting a lightweight, possibly modular construction. The grip is ergonomic and integrated into the lower frame, while a compact sighting device is mounted on the top rail. The barrel is short and squared-off, ending in a faceted muzzle with a red-tinted tip, giving it a distinctive, futuristic appearance. The magazine is not externally visible, and the overall form factor is compact, making it suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, black tactical rifle with blue bands, orange highlights, and a faceted red-tipped muzzle, featuring a top-mounted sight and angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faceted, red-tipped muzzle and the alignment of the blue bands along the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular receiver, orange cutouts, blue bands, and the top-mounted sight.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock end, blue banding, and the compact, squared-off design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the grip, sight, and geometric cutouts.
